'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 125''' was the one hundred twenty-fifth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[May 19]], [[2004]]. It was authored by [[Chris Gardner]], [[Matthew Harvey]], [[Iain Lowson]], [[James McFadden]] and [[Michael Phillips]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}
